steps.title: Use symmetry instead of expanding
steps.content: The equation $(x-47)^2=1$ says that $x$ is exactly $1$ unit away from $47$. That gives one value below $47$ and one value above $47$.

steps.title: Find the two solutions
steps.content: Taking the square root gives $$x-47=1 \quad \text{or} \quad x-47=-1.$$ Therefore $x=48$ or $x=46$.

steps.title: Add the solutions
steps.content: The sum is $$48+46=94.$$ Shortcut check: the two solutions are centered at $47$, so their sum is $2(47)=94$. The answer is 94.
